name: Primal Arcana (Rehearsal)
description: Notes In comparison to the original Primal Arcana, the damage of both the ability and the secondary shots are greatly reduced, but the equip stats and curse duration remain the same.
effects: Your weapon fires two (33% chance for third bullet) more bullets, each dealing 80-100 damage with cooldown 0.2 (0 for third bullet) seconds Curse for 5s Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles
